grades.expectation: Response references CA Protocol section 4.0 or 4.1 specifically
grades.reason: Response mentions CA Protocol generally but does not cite specific sections 4.0 or 4.1

grades.expectation: Response mentions the 4-year enforcement period for operational development
grades.reason: Response mentions enforcement risk and that 2021 is 'well within the period' but does not specify the 4-year rule

grades.expectation: Response discusses whether indemnity insurance is appropriate vs obtaining retrospective consent
grades.reason: Response discusses indemnity insurance appropriateness and mentions retrospective regularisation as an alternative

grades.expectation: Response mentions building regulations as a separate concern from planning
grades.reason: Response clearly separates building regulations approval from planning permission requirements

grades.expectation: Response references specific enforcement timeline rules (4yr/10yr/12mo)
grades.reason: Response does not mention any specific enforcement timeline periods (4-year, 10-year, or 12-month rules)
